title: RLH-1
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''RLH-1''' was a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|Lambda-class T-4a shuttle]] used for prisoner transport assigned to [[Despayre]].

Sometime before the completion of the first [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]], the shuttle was captured by prisoners who had escaped the prison planet. The shuttle was destroyed by [[Villian Dance]] of [[Alpha Squadron]], assigned to the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Steel Talon/Legends|''Steel Talon'']].

==Appearances==
*[[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']]
